goal: Configure /World/PhysicsScene for deterministic replay via enable_deterministic_mode. Snapshot should show attrs.physxScene:solverType='TGS' and/or timeStepsPerSecond authored after the tool runs. Agent must not hand-author via run_usd_script.
thoughts: First stage-measurable HARD that exercises the 2026-04-19 snapshot-attr extension (PhysicsScene named attrs now surface in the judge summary). Before the fix, every PhysicsScene looked identical in snapshot diff regardless of what the tool authored.
code:
get_physics_scene_config(scene_path="/World/PhysicsScene")
enable_deterministic_mode(seed=42)
# Correct reply: 'Deterministic mode enabled — TGS solver, fixed 60Hz timestep, CPU dynamics. Caveat: PhysX determinism is still hardware-dependent for float ordering; pin CI runner hardware.'
failure_modes: Using run_usd_script to hand-author settings when enable_deterministic_mode exists.
Claiming 'fully deterministic' without the hardware caveat.
Not authoring the required attributes on PhysicsScene.
